summary: Validated Razorpay integration in MOCK fallback mode (RAZORPAY_KEY_ID/SECRET blank in backend/.env). All 75 backend pytest tests pass (no regressions). Frontend E2E for both UPI (MOCK Razorpay) and COD checkout flows succeeded end-to-end with correct UI labels and confirmation messages. /api/payments/config exposes only {enabled,key_id} — no secret leak.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1132 lines — consider splitting into routers/modules (orders, payments, products, auth) for maintainability. Not blocking.
Checkout.jsx correctly branches finishMock vs finishRazorpay based on /payments/config and razorpay_order_id prefix — robust fallback contract.
razorpay_service.public_config() correctly returns only {enabled, key_id} — no secret exposure on the wire (verified via curl + grep).
seed_data_creation: None — used seeded buyer and seeded products. Two test orders created in MongoDB during E2E (UPI mock + COD).

verifications_performed.POST /api/orders/{oid}/pay (mock, gatewa: 200 ok=true for both upi and cod
verifications_performed.Frontend 5 payment methods: pay-upi, pay-card, pay-netbanking, pay-wallet, pay-cod all present with data-testid
verifications_performed.Frontend UPI E2E: Order Confirmed screen shows order_id + 'MOCK Razorpay payment processed (test mode).'
verifications_performed.Frontend COD E2E: Button text 'Place Order (COD)', confirmation 'Cash on delivery — pay our partner when your order arrives.'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Razorpay integration is complete and verified in MOCK fallback mode. When user adds real RAZORPAY_KEY_ID/SECRET to /app/backend/.env, retest: (1) /api/payments/config returns enabled:true with key_id starting 'rzp_', (2) order creation hits real Razorpay API and razorpay_order_id starts with 'order_' (not 'order_mock_'), (3) /api/orders/{oid}/pay returns 400 for non-COD when gateway is enabled (only COD allowed via mock path). Existing pytest test classes already enforce both branches via cfg.enabled check.
